data.name: NotFound
data.value: ({0}) not found.

data.name: NotUnqiue
data.value: ({0}) already exists in another record.

data.name: UniqueViolation
data.value: A value that must be unique already exists in another record.

data.name: Conflict
data.value: Another user updated this record before you. Please try again.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. You can ensure it is resolved by sharing the trace ID ({0}) with us.

data.name: BadRequest
data.value: Bad request.

data.name: TooManyRequests
data.value: Too many requests.

data.name: RetryAfter
data.value: Please try again after ({0}).

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: You must log in to access this resource.

data.name: Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: Some
data.value: One or more errors occurred.

data.name: InvalidOtp
data.value: Code is incorrect or expired.

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid token.

data.name: InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid refresh token.

data.name: RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: Refresh token has expired.

data.name: NotHuman
data.value: Verification failed. Please confirm you are not a robot.

data.name: CaptchaServiceUnavailable
data.value: Captcha service error. Please try again.

data.name: PhoneVerificationTokensNotMatching
data.value: Phone verification tokens do not match.

data.name: IAM_CaptchaToken_NotEmpty
data.value: Captcha token cannot be empty.

data.name: ConcurrencyFailure
data.value: Multiple requests tried to update this user at the same time. Please try again.

data.name: DefaultError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: ({0}) Invalid email address.

data.name: InvalidUserName
data.value: ({0}) Invalid phone number.

data.name: DuplicateEmail
data.value: ({0}) email address is already in use by another user.

data.name: DuplicateUserName
data.value: ({0}) phone number is already in use by another user.

data.name: UserNotInRole
data.value: User does not have the ({0}) role.

data.name: DuplicateRoleName
data.value: ({0}) role already exists.

data.name: InvalidRoleName
data.value: ({0}) invalid role name.

data.name: LoginAlreadyAssociated
data.value: This user is already associated with another account.

data.name: PasswordMismatch
data.value: Passwords do not match.

data.name: PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: Password must contain at least ({0}) unique characters.

data.name: PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least ({0}) characters long.

data.name: UserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: User already has a password set.

data.name: UserAlreadyInRole
data.value: User already has the ({0}) role.

data.name: RecoveryCodeRedemptionFailed
data.value: Recovery code could not be redeemed.

data.name: UserLockoutNotEnabled
data.value: User lockout is not enabled.

data.name: ApplicationUser
data.value: User

data.name: PhoneVerificationToken
data.value: Phone verification token

data.name: PaginationRequest_PageNumber_GreaterThanOrEqualTo
data.value: Page number must be greater than or equal to ({0}).

data.name: PaginationRequest_PageSize_InclusiveBetween
data.value: Page size must be between ({0}) and ({1}).

data.name: IAM_PhoneNumber_Length
data.value: Phone number must be ({0}) characters long including the area code.

data.name: IAM_PhoneNumber_DigitsOnly
data.value: Phone number must consist only of digits.

data.name: IAM_PhoneNumber_OnlyTurkey
data.value: Currently only Turkey numbers are supported. Your number must start with 90.

data.name: IAM_PhoneVerificationToken_NotEmpty
data.value: Phone verification token cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_PhoneNumber_NotEmpty
data.value: Phone number cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_Name_NotEmpty
data.value: Name cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_Name_ContainsOnlyTurkishCharacters
data.value: Name must contain only Turkish characters.

data.name: Register_Name_MaxLength
data.value: Name can be at most ({0}) characters long.

data.name: Register_LastName_NotEmpty
data.value: Last name cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_LastName_ContainsOnlyTurkishCharacters
data.value: Last name must contain only Turkish characters.

data.name: Register_LastName_MaxLength
data.value: Last name can be at most ({0}) characters long.

data.name: Register_NationalIdentityNumber_NotEmpty
data.value: National identity number cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_NationalIdentityNumber_Length
data.value: National identity number must be ({0}) characters long.

data.name: Register_NationalIdentityNumber_ContainsOnlyDigits
data.value: National identity number must consist only of digits.

data.name: Register_BirthDate_NotEmpty
data.value: Birth date cannot be empty.

data.name: Register_BirthDate_Format
data.value: Birth date format must be ({0}).

data.name: DbUpdateConcurrencyException
data.value: Database concurrency error. Please try again.

data.name: UniqueConstraintException
data.value: A value that must be unique already exists.

data.name: CannotInsertNullException
data.value: A field that cannot be empty was left empty.

data.name: MaxLengthExceededException
data.value: Maximum length of a field has been exceeded.

data.name: NumericOverflowException
data.value: Numeric value of a field has exceeded its capacity.

data.name: ReferenceConstraintException
data.value: Referenced record not found or cannot be deleted.

data.name: BadHttpRequestException
data.value: Bad HTTP request.

data.name: ClientClosedRequest
data.value: Request was closed by the client.
